description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow set within a rectangular plot bordered by dense hedges. The house features a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout with large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious backyard. The backyard includes a circular trampoline, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a well-maintained lawn. The front of the property has a driveway leading to a garage, with a car parked outside, and a paved walkway to the main entrance. The exterior walls are primarily white with some gray accents, and the property includes a swimming pool on one side. The overall design emphasizes open space, outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a backyard with a trampoline and patio, and a front driveway with a garage. The property is surrounded by hedges and features a swimming pool on one side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the backyard with a trampoline, patio seating, and the swimming pool on the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, garage, main entrance, and the open lawn leading to the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the backyard, trampoline, and the swimming pool on the left.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backyard, patio area, and the dense hedge border surrounding the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
